Trigger.Regex: (?<Player>.+?) placed the rally banner in (?<Location>.+).
(\\aPC -?\d+ [^:]+:[^\\]+\\/a says|You say) to the \w+, ?"(?i)F"
:(?<Player>.+?)\\/a tells you, ?"(?<Message>.+)"
[^ ]+ has attempted to lead your group into (?<zone>[^\.]+)\. Because you are already saved to this instance, you must lead the group inside.
Because you are already saved to this instance,
In the name of the Ancient
placed the rally banner in
Ready Check: Everyone is ready except:
Trigger.SoundData: these assholes are not ready yet

Trigger.Regex: (\\aPC -?\d+ [^:]+:[^\\]+\\/a says|You say) to the (group|guild|raid party), ?"(?i)F"
I will tear open the water rifts
The waves obey my every command
Underestimating the power of the sea
A runic pitfall is summoned. It appears to be tracking your motions!
Ageless Custodian's Cleanse freezes
An accursed rift opens near you!
The custodian's runes begin to glow more intensely
As long as I live
Get over here!
Increasing your throughput
Mucigenic Storm
You are being used as a conduit
You are now attuned to (?<color>.+?)!
Major Parasitic Infection hits (?<name>[a-zA-Z]+)
.*I will tear open the water rifts!
.*Underestimating the power of the sea, are we?
Arch Magistor Modrfrost's Everlasting Fire(?: critically)? hits (?<cTarget>\w+).*
Arch Magistor Modrfrost's Ghastly Pallor(?: critically)? hits (?<cTarget>\w+).*
Arch Magistor Modrfrost's Lethal Proximity(?: critically)? zaps (?<who>\w+).*
Arch-Magistor Modrfrost's Magistor’s Scourge(?: critically)? hits (?<Player>[A-Za-z]+) .*
.*?A poisonous fog begins to appear!*
.*?Come my children*
.*?The center room catches ablaze!*
.*?The outer rooms catches ablaze!*
.*Darkness looms beneath you all.
You begin to see your enemy's weakness. This may be a good time to exploit it!
an arcane conqueror
You have been called to battle
.*?time I give you something to REALLY be afraid of.*
A column of flame appears before
You feel the eyes of an unseen threat close at hand
You are infected with a parasitic spore
You will soon bear the Mark of Malediction
Trigger.SoundData: STOP ATTACK STOP CAST JUST STOP EVERYTHING

Trigger.Regex: You feel inspired
We must work together if we are to prevail
Bastion begins to draw energy from the closest energy source
Bastion the Immovable\\/a says, "You stay put
Bastion\\/a says, "You stay put
a fallen warrior
Tainted Blood hits YOU
(?<Player>.+?) has killed a time-phased elemental
Dagarn begins to shake violently
Dozekar's body begins to glow with the force of his inner rage
Malteor's body begins to immolate
The skeletal dragon begins thrashing with a toxic force that will prove fatal to anyone near
Time to seek cover
(?<Player>.+?)'s Dispatch (?:critically )?hits (?<victim>.+?) for (?<damage>\d+) piercing damage\.
a dance with (?<Player>.+?) may remove this effect
Shiny Distraction hits (?<Player>.+?) for
there may be some sort of way for a bard to remove this effect
there may be some sort of way for your raid to dispel this effect
Flaming Cocktail hits YOU
The quivering cocoon gathers near (\w+) and it looks unstable...
Zebrun the Torso's Running Scared.*
\\#FF0000The rabid spirit of Vexven draws out your hidden rage!
\\#FF0000Thresinet ignores+
\\#FF0000Vexven hunts beyond for souls\.\.\.
\\#FF0000Vexven hunts nearby for souls\.\.\.
\\#FF0000Vexven's spirit has a taste for mana\.\.\.
Demoralizing Swipe on (?<victim>.+?) will expire soon
Divine Despair on (?<victim>.+?) will expire soon
Pall of the Elements on (?<victim>.+?) will expire soon
Slice of Despair on (?<victim>.+?) will expire soon
you tenaciously cling to life!
You have vexed me for the last time priest!
Trigger.TimerName: "You have vexed me for the last time priest!"

Trigger.Regex: .*?Divine Despair on .*? will expire soon.*?
.*?Pall of the Elements on .*? will expire soon.*?
.*?Slice of Despair on .*? will expire soon.*?
.*?An energy vortex begins to form near the raid.*
\\aNPC \d+ (?<name>.+)'s Darkened Reflection:(?<name2>.+)'s Darkened Reflection\D\Da says
Are you ready for the thunder
Illusory Arm on Fereng
Time to mix things up a bit
Drinal begins to channel his energy in preparation for a massive smite
Drinal's Exhaustive Souldrain hits YOU
Drinal's light fills ([A-Za-z]+)
An echo of terror should put an end to my pain
Eriak prepares to unleash his Demonic Blast
You have the spectral blast curse upon you
(?<Player>[a-zA-Z]+) sees something incoming to their position! They might want to point them out for the rest of the raidforce!
noxious gas cloud dissipates
.*Don't give away your strategy!
Charanda's nocious gas cloud burns
Charanda's noxious gas cloud burns
Oi! Say that to me face!
The shambling corpse seeks out (?<name>[a-zA-Z]+)
You think hiding behind me will save you
You think hiding behind me will save you? Think again!
The rum master stumbles toward (?<name>.+)!
Trigger.Category: F.S. Distillery: Distill or Be Killed [Heroic]

Trigger.Regex: .*You notice the blacksmith's anvil on one of the workbenches in the room!
.*You notice the blacksmith's hammer on one of the workbenches in the room!
.*You notice the blacksmith's metal on one of the workbenches in the room!
Come forth my brethren
points a boney finger at ([a-zA-Z]+)
Through the portal, now
You are foolish to fight a weaponsmith in his own domain! To my side!
Join me in combat
You are foolish to fight a weaponsmith in his own domain
You notice the blacksmith's anvil
You notice the blacksmith's hammer
You notice the blacksmith's metal
General Teku prepares a draconian assault
Around and around you go, as the music plays on!
Glokus gathers the forces of the wind around him
An Aura of Death empowers me
An Aura of Destruction empowers me
elite diaku war rider
Goreslaughter prepares a massive attack
Toll of War smites YOU
Aid your servant Rallos, so that I may smite these insects
Bolgin drank too much of his potion
.*?The quivering cocoon gathers*
Time Warp is now ready for use*
\\#FFFF00An Undertow Elemental forms in the water below...
\\#FFFF00Karith'Ta is protecting the sphere, destroy the protection before it grows too strong!
\\#FFFF00The massive sledge above the platform begins to shake as if it is about to come crashing down!
begins his ritual of rage
.*?Lichlord Skulldugger's Noxious Timebomb hits (\w+).*
\\#FF0000You are zapped by arcing circuitry eminating from (?<name>[A-z]+)!
\\#00FF00You are touched by the resonance of the lyrical bubble!
.*?Kiernun the Lyrical sends out a lyrical blast in all directions*
Power Generator Diamond has activated!
Power Generator Emerald has activated!
Power Generator Opal has activated!
Power Generator Ruby has activated!
Power Generator Sapphire has activated!
You feel the force of powerful magic being brought down upon you!
Your magic cannot hinder Valor incarnate
Teraradus the Gorer prepares to unleash a mighty roar!
\\aPC -?\d+ (?<Player>[^:]+):[^\\]+\\/a says to the (group|raid party), ".*(?i)(lifeburn|life burn)
begins stalking (?<Player>[a-zA-Z]+)
Etet the Skull stares into the eyes
prepares to unleash a poison
The blessing subsides!
The power of malice blesses this being!
begins to play his song of flame!
begins to play his song of ice!
begins to play his song of water!
dispels Lesser Congeal from Sacrificer Aevila D'Serin.
Virtuoso Edgar V'Zann focuses his energy into a protective veil of notes!
([a-zA-Z]+) and the ground begins to quake!
Trigger.SoundData: $1 is being targeted, Joust Joust Joust

Trigger.Regex: .*?Curse of Devastation hits (?<person>[^ ]+).*
Azara the Seer begins a powerful ritual
Kendis Parmare invokes a retributive aura
Lieutenant Buldoral raises his axe
Penda Parmare invokes a retributive aura
You are overcome with a sense of your inevitable annihilation
.*?You are cursed with Summoner's Enigma*
Arkatanthis the Destroyer's (Curse of Destruction|Greater Curse of Destruction) (hits|diseases) (?<Player>.+) (for|draining)
Xilaxis begins a ritual designed to gate in a powerful entity
An echo of terror should
Danger, Tainted Blood can only be removed
Tagrin prepares to unleash a mighty attack!
You see a shadowy figure enter the fray!
a drowned soul spawns, looking to make one of your party into a mindless slave like it is!
Abyssal Suffocation hits ([A-Za-z]+)
Multiple Avatars appear
The seas shall run red with your blood
The seas shall run red with your blood!
Pumpkins scream in the dead of night
I restore myself to full power, your impairments are lost as I heal my wounds
(?<attacker>Drusella Sathir) (?:begins to shield herself in a necromantic aura\.|is shielded in a necromantic aura!)
.*?A sphere of toxic energy appears beneath Toxxulia's Feet.*
.*?Arkanthis the Destroyer's Curse of Destruction(?: critically)? hits (?<who>\w+).*
.*?Arkatanthis the Destroyer's Curse of Destruction(?: critically)? hits (?<who>\w+).*
.*?Curse of Destruction(?: critically)? hits (?<cTarget>\w+).*
.*?Curse of the Taaskat(?: critically)? hits (?<cTarget>\w+).*
.*?he seems to be channeling energy from the surrounding ocean itself!*
.*?I call forth mystical energies as proof against this (?<who>\w+).*
.*?Maalus Imbued's Greater Curse of Devastation(?: critically)? hits (?<who>\w+).*
\\#FF0000The gigantic dragon has swallowed (?<Player>.+) whole!
A dangerous device appears,
Auxillary energy activated, eradication mode engaged.
Transform and serve me WORM!
You are consumed by the flames of the mystical pyre!
You have been afflicted with Star-charged Soul!*
You have been afflicted with Void-charged Soul!*
You take massive damage
Sevalak grows dark as powerful energy courses throughout his massive form!
static elemental
(?<Player>.+?)' Bloodletter (?:critically )?heals (?<victim>.+?) for (?<damage>\d+) hit points\.
(?<Player>.+?)'s Bloodletter (?:critically )?heals (?<victim>.+?) for (?<damage>\d+) hit points\.
Ahhhh, permanent immunity to yet another source of your power!
Drop that accursed device NOW!
Fighting you is getting me nowhere, time to change things up!
Time to end this with one fatally melodious aria
Death Report
Trigger.SoundData: My name is Sennhe and I'm very mad

Trigger.Regex: Arc Lightning hits YOU
Trigger.SoundData: GET OUT GET OUT GET OUT

Trigger.Regex: Necrotic Venom hits YOU
:(?<Attacker>.+?)\\/a says, "Channeling the power of fear into my brothers!"
Diviner Gelerin's Psionic Blast zaps YOU
Mindscorcher Shelik begins to focus his destruction in the direction of ([A-Za-z]+)
Overlord Talan's Arc Lightning hits YOU
Trigger.SoundData: GET OUT GET OUT GET OUT

Trigger.Regex: Overlord Talan's Necrotic Venom hits YOU
Overlord Talan's Psionic Blast zaps YOU
Persecutor Barid's Psionic Blast zaps YOU
The stone begins to emit a soothing hum
You feel a powerful curse being cast upon you

Trigger.Regex: An infernal assassin moves toward you
Dozekar's body begins to glow with the force of his inner rage
Eudoxxus begins a ritual of stone.
Milas channels energies from the Chronorift into himself
The enkindled sentry begins to glow and a strange humming sound warns of imminent danger
.*Intruders must die!
a shard of velium armor is knocked loose then comes alive
An amalgum of air
An amalgum of earth
an elemental warder
Ancient Sentinel's Touch of Velium
.*Farozth Ssravizh prepares to release scaled vengence upon anyone near to his location!
Farozth Ssravizh's Ancient Devastation hits (?<name>[A-z]+)
Farozth Ssravizh's Ancient Devastation hits.*
Farozth Ssravizh's Scaled Vengeance hits (?<name>.+) but fails to inflict any damage.
Farozth Ssravizh's Scaled Vengeance hits (?<name>[A-z]+)
Scaled Vengence hits (?<name>[a-zA-Z]+)
Feel the searing touch of the Tavalans!
Overlord Talan places his hand on a groupmate's shoulder.
\\#FF0000King Lockt shouts,"(?<name>[A-z]+), begone from my sight! YOU are henceforth exiled from this ritual!"
\\#FFFF00(?<name>.+) becomes energized for a short time
The Avatar begins to glow with rage
\\#FF0000Sullon Zek will become unpredictable if she sees herself in the mirror, you must destroy it\!
You shout, "Sullon Zek will become unpredictable if she sees herself in the mirror, you must destroy it\!"
.*?My rage is without limits.*
shadowy brigands appear
Tagrin prepares to unleash a mighty attack
You see a shadowy figure enter the fray!

.*?General Utehk's Backlash hits YOU.*
.*?General Utehk's Backlash zaps YOU.*?

General Utehk's Backlash hits YOU
I call forth spirits of the earth

Trigger.Regex: .*calls upon a circle of the four powers!
.*Targetted for Destruction hits*
Tavekalem's Burning Skin hits YOU*
Tavekalem's Slime Spray hits YOU*
Tavekalem's Wandering Mind confounds YOU*
Taste the wrath of a thousand blows!
In the name of the Ancient Cul'Zoda Xyx, I command you to CEASE
We must work together if we are to prevail
Primus Pilus Gunnr's Centurion's Slaying hits (?<Player>.+) for \d+ slashing damage.
Trigger.Category: Throne of Storms: Hall of Legends [Challenge]

Trigger.Regex: Arch-Magistor Modrfrost's Everlasting Fire hits (?<Player>.+) (for \d+ heat damage|but fails to inflict any damage).
Trigger.Category: Throne of Storms: Hall of Legends

Trigger.Regex: Arch-Magistor Modrfrost's Ghastly Pallor hits (?<Player>.+) (for \d+ magic damage|but fails to inflict any damage).
Trigger.Category: Throne of Storms: Hall of Legends

Trigger.Regex: .*?Overwhelming has drawn too much of*
.*?Rarthek the Swiftclaw opens his jaws*
Trakanon's Static Repulsion hits
Mark of Repulsion hits (?<name>[a-zA-Z]+)
Prophetic Bolt Hits YOU
Static Repulsion
Trakanon's Pestilential Pause hits YOU
You no longer feel the protection of the strange aura.
.*?I will BREAK YOU, insurgent!.*
The Ancient's Curse hits (\w+)
You cannot hinder a force of nature with such pathetic magic
You are struck with infernal condundrum
Zaalax's Call of the Underfoot(?: critically)? hits (?<Player>.+?)
.*?Eriak the Fetid's Spectral Blast hits (?<Player>[a-zA-Z]+) .*
.*?Eriak the Fetid's Spectral Blast hits(?<Player>[a-zA-Z]+) .*
.*?From the depths of war, I bring forth a fissure!*
.*?Grevog the Punisher's Flaming Cocktail hits(?<Player>[a-zA-Z]+) .*
.*?Infuriation of Valor is cast upon (?<cTarget>\w+).*
.*?killed a time-phased elemental*
.*?Pall of the Elements on*
.*?Sevalak grows dark as powerful*
.*?The massive strike from the Idol of Zek.*
.*?You feel a rumbling beneath you, growing louder by the second.
.*?You stay put, I have more pressing invaders to deal with!*
.*A column of flame appears before (?<cTarget>\w+)\.
.*cackles as he prepares himself.*
.*Dagarn begins to shake violently
.*Ikatiar stares intently your way, toxic slime dripping from his jaws. Time to seek cover!
.*Perhaps I should strike at the ones who are the weaker links!
.*The pylon expands and shudders!*
.*You are struck with infernal condundrum, allowing you to attack
\#0099CC(?<name>\w+) can only see through his or her mind's eye!
A fabled spirit manifests somewhere within the dungeon, making its way to the exit! Slay it before it escapes!
Commander Yutzal calls upon the spirits of her ancestors!
Controller Ervin's Latent Burst hits YOU
Taaltak the Mighty begins to shake with rage!
a minion of war
#FF0000You are assigned to the (?<color>.+?) dome\.$
.*?Army of stone, rise up and aid your ambassador.*
.*?The Commander shakes with rage, as he prepares a savage attack!.*
.*?You have been chosen to fight golem 1.*
.*?You have been chosen to fight golem 2.*
Lichlord Skulldugger\\/a says, "Your puny magic weakens me no more

Taskmaster Nichok summons your entire party to him

You have disrupted a dangerous ritual!
You hear distant drumbeats and chanting
Venril Sathir's Mana Sacrifice zaps YOU
You are empowered with elemental energy
The massive boar goes on a rampage
Necromunger's Will
You feel the hand of the Great Devourer looming above you
a sense of resolve the others don't possess
You feel imbued with a sense of resolve the others don't possess..you can affect things that they cannot!
You see a strange troll enter the room and begin some suspicious work, no one else seems to notice!
Mo'iana the Ravenous' Major Parasitic Infection hits ([A-Za-z]+)
The Crumbling Icon shouts the name, (?<name>[a-zA-Z]+)
I cast aside your paltry magic

Spell.Name: "You have vexed me for the last time priest!"
